comment: Love the new dashboard — finally a simple way to see all my runs at once.
Logs are useful but scrolling through 500 lines to find one error is painful.
The webhook trigger feature is great. Worked first try.
Billing is confusing. Got charged twice last month and support took 5 days to respond.
When will there be a Python SDK? The HTTP API is fine but an SDK would be faster.
Great tool overall. No complaints yet.
Archive button is in a weird spot and I've hit delete twice by accident.
Just wanted to say thanks — this replaced three cron jobs and saved my weekend.
Docs could be more specific about how secrets interact with pipelines.
I really dislike the dark theme's contrast on small text. Please add a high-contrast option.
